100.description: Sabar ta karbi kan buƙatun kuma ya kamata abokin ciniki ya ci gaba da aika jikin buƙatar.

201.description: Buƙatar ta yi nasara kuma an ƙirƙiri sabon tushe.

204.description: Sabar ta yi nasarar aiwatar da buƙatar amma ba ta dawo da kowane abun ciki ba.

301.description: An sanya sabon URI na dindindin ga tushen da aka nema.

400.description: Sabar ba za ta iya aiwatar da buƙatar ba saboda kuskuren abokin ciniki.

401.description: Buƙatar tana buƙatar tantance mai amfani.

403.description: Sabar ta fahimci buƙatar amma ta ƙi ba da izini.

404.description: Sabar ba za ta iya samun tushen da aka nema ba.

429.description: Mai amfani ya aika buƙatu da yawa a cikin wani lokaci.

500.description: Sabar ta fuskanci wani yanayi da ba a zata ba.

502.description: Sabar ta sami martani mara kyau daga sabar ta sama.

503.description: Sabar ba ta iya sarrafa buƙatar a halin yanzu.

504.description: Sabar ba ta sami martani a kan lokaci daga sabar ta sama ba.
